scripts.test:e2e:dashboard: npm run test:e2e:seed && node scripts/tools/e2e-preflight.mjs && playwright test e2e/dashboard.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:navigation: npm run test:e2e:seed && DATA_BACKEND=prisma node scripts/tools/e2e-preflight.mjs && DATA_BACKEND=prisma playwright test e2e/navigation.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:depth-chart: npm run test:e2e:seed && node scripts/tools/e2e-preflight.mjs && playwright test e2e/depth-chart.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:action: npm run test:e2e:seed && node scripts/tools/e2e-preflight.mjs && playwright test e2e/inbox-action.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:draft: npm run test:e2e:seed && node scripts/tools/e2e-preflight.mjs && playwright test e2e/draft-mvp.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:week-loop: XDG_CONFIG_HOME=.local/firebase-config npx firebase-tools emulators:exec --only firestore --project demo-afbm "DATA_BACKEND=firestore FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=demo-afbm NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=demo-afbm E2E_USER_ID=firebase-e2e-owner npm run firebase:reset && DATA_BACKEND=firestore FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=demo-afbm NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=demo-afbm E2E_USER_ID=firebase-e2e-owner npm run firebase:seed && DATA_BACKEND=firestore FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=demo-afbm NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=demo-afbm E2E_USER_ID=firebase-e2e-owner npm run firebase:e2e:browser-fixture && DATA_BACKEND=firestore FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=demo-afbm NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=demo-afbm E2E_USER_ID=firebase-e2e-owner playwright test e2e/firebase-browser-flow.spec.ts"
scripts.test:e2e:week-loop:prisma: npm run test:e2e:seed && node scripts/tools/e2e-preflight.mjs && DATA_BACKEND=prisma playwright test e2e/week-loop.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e: DATA_BACKEND=prisma node scripts/tools/e2e-preflight.mjs && DATA_BACKEND=prisma playwright test e2e/smoke.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:multiplayer: DATA_BACKEND=prisma node scripts/tools/e2e-preflight.mjs && DATA_BACKEND=prisma playwright test e2e/multiplayer-smoke.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:multiplayer:firebase: XDG_CONFIG_HOME=.local/firebase-config npx firebase-tools emulators:exec --only firestore,auth --project demo-afbm "FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=demo-afbm NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=demo-afbm NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_API_KEY=demo-api-key NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN=demo-afbm.firebaseapp.com NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET=demo-afbm.appspot.com NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID=000000000000 NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_APP_ID=1:000000000000:web:e2e NEXT_PUBLIC_AFBM_ONLINE_BACKEND=firebase NEXT_PUBLIC_FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:8080 NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_AUTH_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:9099 npm run test:e2e:multiplayer:firebase:run"
scripts.test:e2e:multiplayer:firebase:draft: XDG_CONFIG_HOME=.local/firebase-config npx firebase-tools emulators:exec --only firestore,auth --project demo-afbm "FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=demo-afbm NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=demo-afbm NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_API_KEY=demo-api-key NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN=demo-afbm.firebaseapp.com NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET=demo-afbm.appspot.com NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID=000000000000 NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_APP_ID=1:000000000000:web:e2e NEXT_PUBLIC_AFBM_ONLINE_BACKEND=firebase NEXT_PUBLIC_FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:8080 NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_AUTH_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:9099 playwright test e2e/multiplayer-firebase-fantasy-draft.spec.ts"
scripts.test:multiplayer:mvp: npx tsc --noEmit && npm run lint && vitest run src/lib/online/online-league-service.test.ts src/lib/online/fantasy-draft.test.ts src/lib/online/fantasy-draft-service.test.ts src/lib/admin/online-admin-actions.test.ts src/lib/online/multiplayer-firebase-mvp-actions.test.ts && npm run test:e2e:multiplayer && npm run test:firebase:mvp
scripts.test:release:staging: npx tsc --noEmit && npm run lint && npm run test:run && npm run test:firebase:mvp && npm run build
scripts.db:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d postgres
scripts.firebase:emulators: XDG_CONFIG_HOME=.local/firebase-config npx firebase-tools emulators:start --only firestore --project demo-afbm
scripts.firebase:staging:deploy:rules: XDG_CONFIG_HOME=.local/firebase-config npx firebase-tools deploy --only firestore:rules -P staging
scripts.firebase:staging:deploy:indexes: XDG_CONFIG_HOME=.local/firebase-config npx firebase-tools deploy --only firestore:indexes -P staging
scripts.seed:multiplayer:reset:staging: CONFIRM_STAGING_SEED=true USE_FIRESTORE_EMULATOR=false GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT=afbm-staging npm run seed:multiplayer:reset
scripts.seed:multiplayer:league:staging: CONFIRM_STAGING_SEED=true USE_FIRESTORE_EMULATOR=false GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT=afbm-staging npm run seed:multiplayer:league
scripts.test:firebase: XDG_CONFIG_HOME=.local/firebase-config npx firebase-tools emulators:exec --only firestore --project demo-afbm "AFBM_INCLUDE_FIRESTORE_TESTS=true vitest run --fileParallelism=false src/lib/firebase/admin.test.ts src/server/repositories/index.test.ts scripts/seeds/firestore-seed.test.ts src/lib/firebase/firestore.rules.test.ts src/server/repositories/firestoreTeamsPlayers.test.ts src/server/repositories/firestoreSeasonWeekMatch.test.ts src/server/repositories/firestoreWeekMatchState.test.ts src/server/repositories/firestoreGameOutput.test.ts src/server/repositories/firestoreStatsAggregates.test.ts src/server/repositories/firestoreReportsReadModels.test.ts"
scripts.test:firebase:repositories: XDG_CONFIG_HOME=.local/firebase-config npx firebase-tools emulators:exec --only firestore --project demo-afbm "AFBM_INCLUDE_FIRESTORE_TESTS=true vitest run src/server/repositories/firestoreTeamsPlayers.test.ts"
scripts.test:firebase:season-week-match: XDG_CONFIG_HOME=.local/firebase-config npx firebase-tools emulators:exec --only firestore --project demo-afbm "AFBM_INCLUDE_FIRESTORE_TESTS=true vitest run src/server/repositories/firestoreSeasonWeekMatch.test.ts"
scripts.test:firebase:week-state: XDG_CONFIG_HOME=.local/firebase-config npx firebase-tools emulators:exec --only firestore --project demo-afbm "AFBM_INCLUDE_FIRESTORE_TESTS=true vitest run src/server/repositories/firestoreWeekMatchState.test.ts"
scripts.test:firebase:game-output: XDG_CONFIG_HOME=.local/firebase-config npx firebase-tools emulators:exec --only firestore --project demo-afbm "AFBM_INCLUDE_FIRESTORE_TESTS=true vitest run src/server/repositories/firestoreGameOutput.test.ts"
scripts.test:firebase:stats: XDG_CONFIG_HOME=.local/firebase-config npx firebase-tools emulators:exec --only firestore --project demo-afbm "AFBM_INCLUDE_FIRESTORE_TESTS=true vitest run src/server/repositories/firestoreStatsAggregates.test.ts"
scripts.test:firebase:readmodels: XDG_CONFIG_HOME=.local/firebase-config npx firebase-tools emulators:exec --only firestore --project demo-afbm "AFBM_INCLUDE_FIRESTORE_TESTS=true vitest run src/server/repositories/firestoreReportsReadModels.test.ts"
scripts.test:firebase:parity: XDG_CONFIG_HOME=.local/firebase-config npx firebase-tools emulators:exec --only firestore --project demo-afbm "AFBM_INCLUDE_FIRESTORE_TESTS=true vitest run src/server/repositories/firestoreE2eParity.test.ts"
scripts.test:firebase:rules: XDG_CONFIG_HOME=.local/firebase-config npx firebase-tools emulators:exec --only firestore --project demo-afbm "AFBM_INCLUDE_FIRESTORE_TESTS=true vitest run src/lib/firebase/firestore.rules.test.ts"
scripts.test:firebase:mvp: npm run test:firebase:rules && npm run test:firebase:parity && npm run test:e2e:multiplayer:firebase && npm run test:e2e:multiplayer:firebase:draft
